title: serissa foetida
intro: Serissa foetida, also known as the snowrose or tree of heaven, is a tropical evergreen shrub native to Southeast Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Serissa foetida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Serissa foetida are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
